chain.thought: Explanation: Count the featured guests for each song. judge_thought:
Explanation:
Reviewing the "featured guest(s)" column:
- "keep hustlin" features E-40 & Too Short (2 guests)
- "cheddar" features Mack 10 & Ice Cube (2 guests)
- "the shadiest one" features CJ Mac (1 guest)
- "can't hold back" features Ice Cube (1 guest)
- "better days" features Ron Banks (1 guest)
- "like that" features Ice Cube, Daz Dillinger & CJ Mac (3 guests)
All others list no featured guests. Therefore, "like that" has the most featured guests with 3.
